user.title: Connect to Ferroamp Energy Hub
user.description: Enter the Modbus TCP connection details for your Ferroamp Energy Hub.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Ferroamp hub. Check the IP address and port, and verify that Modbus TCP is enabled on the device. If Modbus TCP has not been activated, contact Ferroamp support.
error.invalid_limits: Minimum grid limit must be less than or equal to maximum grid limit.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Ferroamp hub is already configured.
